semantic.role: View Producer for Markdown architectural briefing documents in ArchSpine's analytics pipeline.
responsibilities: Generate a Markdown artifact that summarizes architectural diagnostics (cycle reports, dead code reports, hub reports) along with loaded rules.
Escape Markdown inline characters safely to prevent rendering issues.
Implement the ViewProducer interface, accepting a ViewContext and returning a ViewArtifact.
Load rules from the configured directory using loadRulesFromDir to include in the briefing output.
outOfScope: Execution of graph diagnostics (CycleReport, DeadCodeReport, HubReport) — those are produced by engines.
Direct rule enforcement or analysis — rules are loaded but only included as data.
Configuration loading of SpineConfig — passed in via context.
invariants: The produced artifact must be valid Markdown and safe for rendering (no unescaped special characters).
The output must handle missing or empty diagnostic data without crashing.
The rules directory must be readable and JSON well-formed; otherwise, fallback gracefully.
ViewContext must provide at least the diagnostic reports and rule configuration path.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a view layer to render architectural diagnostics as human-readable Markdown briefings, enabling developers to quickly understand system health without reading raw data.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Initial commit — introduces the briefing producer for the ArchSpine analytics pipeline.

publicSurface.description: Exported default function that implements the ViewProducer interface. Accepts a ViewContext containing CycleReport, DeadCodeReport, HubReport, and a path to rules; returns a ViewArtifact with the Markdown brief. Called by the view orchestration engine to generate the briefing page.
